design_plan: rng=42; AIDA: attention(hero benchmark vs workflow), interest(compare), desire(cache advantage), action(CTA); hero max-width 1120px 2–3 lines; bento grid uses grid-auto-flow:dense; label sweep includes Folk, Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok; button contrast checked on paper/ink
headline: Super vs Grok — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: A fair comparison of Super and Grok for people evaluating agentic AI. Grok 4.3 shows strong agentic benchmarks and configurable reasoning, while Super is purpose‑built for repeated computer‑use workflows with a reusable computer-use cache that compounds efficiency over time.
